name: InvocationContext
description: Safe per-node facade for images, tensors, conditioning, models, logging, config, progress utilities, and boards inside BaseInvocation.invoke(self, context).

interfaces.name: ImagesInterface
interfaces.description: Methods to save, get, and inspect images and image metadata.

methods.name: get_dto
methods.description: Gets an image as an ImageDTO object.

methods.name: get_metadata
methods.description: Gets an image's metadata, if it has any.

methods.name: get_path
methods.description: Gets the internal path to an image or thumbnail.

methods.name: get_pil
methods.description: Gets a copy of an image as a PIL Image object, optionally converted to a color mode.

methods.name: save
methods.signature: (image: Image, board_id: Optional[str] = None, image_category: ImageCategory = ImageCategory.GENERAL, metadata: Optional[MetadataField] = None) -> ImageDTO
methods.description: Saves a PIL image and returns its DTO; automatically applies workflow metadata and WithBoard/WithMetadata defaults.

interfaces.name: TensorsInterface
interfaces.description: Methods to save and load tensor payloads by generated name.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads a tensor by name and returns a copy.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Saves a tensor and returns its name.

interfaces.name: ConditioningInterface
interfaces.description: Methods to save and load conditioning data by generated name.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads conditioning data by name and returns a copy.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Saves conditioning data and returns its name.

interfaces.name: ModelsInterface
interfaces.description: Common API for checking, searching, downloading, and loading models.

methods.name: download_and_cache_model
methods.description: Downloads/caches a model-like resource and returns its path.

methods.name: exists
methods.description: Checks if a model exists by key or model field.

methods.name: get_absolute_path
methods.description: Resolves a model config or path to an absolute path.

methods.name: get_config
methods.description: Gets a model config by key or model field.

methods.name: load
methods.signature: (identifier: Union[str, ModelIdentifierField], submodel_type: Optional[SubModelType] = None) -> LoadedModel
methods.description: Loads a registered model or submodel.

methods.name: load_by_attrs
methods.signature: (name: str, base: BaseModelType, type: ModelType, submodel_type: Optional[SubModelType] = None) -> LoadedModel
methods.description: Loads a unique model found by name/base/type attributes.

methods.name: load_local_model
methods.signature: (model_path: Path, loader: Optional[Callable[[Path], AnyModel]] = None) -> LoadedModelWithoutConfig
methods.description: Loads a local model file without a model database config.

methods.name: load_remote_model
methods.signature: (source: str | AnyHttpUrl, loader: Optional[Callable[[Path], AnyModel]] = None) -> LoadedModelWithoutConfig
methods.description: Downloads/caches and loads a remote model file without a database config.

methods.name: search_by_attrs
methods.signature: (name: Optional[str] = None, base: Optional[BaseModelType] = None, type: Optional[ModelType] = None, format: Optional[ModelFormat] = None) -> list[AnyModelConfig]
methods.description: Searches registered models by attributes.

methods.name: search_by_path
methods.description: Searches registered models by path.

interfaces.name: LoggerInterface
interfaces.description: App logger methods exposed to nodes.

methods.name: debug
methods.description: Logs a debug message.

methods.name: error
methods.description: Logs an error message.

methods.name: info
methods.description: Logs an info message.

methods.name: warning
methods.description: Logs a warning message.

interfaces.name: ConfigInterface
interfaces.description: Read-only access to the current app config object.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Gets the app config.

interfaces.name: UtilInterface
interfaces.description: Cancellation, progress, and diffusion step callback utilities.

methods.name: flux2_step_callback
methods.description: Emits a Flux 2 step progress event.

methods.name: flux_step_callback
methods.description: Emits a Flux step progress event.

methods.name: is_canceled
methods.description: Checks if the current session has been canceled.

methods.name: sd_step_callback
methods.description: Emits a Stable Diffusion step progress event.

methods.name: signal_progress
methods.signature: (message: str, percentage: float | None = None, image: Image | None = None, image_size: tuple[int, int] | None = None) -> None
methods.description: Emits a progress message and optional preview.

interfaces.name: BoardsInterface
interfaces.description: Methods to interact with user boards.

methods.name: add_image_to_board
methods.description: Adds an image to a board.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a board for the current user.

methods.name: get_all
methods.description: Gets all boards accessible to the current user.

methods.name: get_all_image_names_for_board
methods.description: Gets image names for a board.

methods.name: get_dto
methods.description: Gets a board DTO.
